Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared for plaintiff E.M. Hundley Hardware Co., a California corporation.
Grant Hundley, President of E.M. Hundley Hardware Co., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Lynn E. Kosshinski, as an individual and dba UC Doors & Windows, or JIMBOB Properties, a business entity, form unknown.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 19, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants UC Doors & windows, a business entity, form unknown, and Does 1 to 50 was filed today, February 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of E.M. Hundley hardware Co., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Lynn E. Kolshinski, as an individual and dba UC Doors & Windows, and JIMBOB Properties, a business entity, form unknown, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,822.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,327.11.
Costs - $565.00, for a total of $31,714.11.

As to defendant Lynn E. Kolshinski, as an individual and dba UC Doors & Windows:

Damages/Principal - $4,726.39.
Interest - $847.83, for a total of $5,574.22.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
